recipes.name: Apple Silicon Ternary Bonsai 27B (PrismML Metal)
recipes.summary: PrismML Metal llama.cpp + Ternary Bonsai 27B Q2_0_g128 for on-device 27B-class reasoning (~7.2 GB).
recommendedFor: M-series Macs with at least 24 GB unified memory

versions.notes: Native host CUDA build; superseded by Docker-managed runtime matching Spark fleet convention.
Docker image lloom/llama-cpp-prism:cuda with DSpark + prompt-cache lanes.
Aligns publisher sampling defaults and advertises the plain lane's true per-slot context window.

recipes.name: DGX Spark Ternary Bonsai 27B (Docker PrismML CUDA + DSpark)
recipes.summary: Docker-managed PrismML CUDA llama.cpp + Ternary Bonsai 27B with DSpark for GB10 / DGX Spark.
recommendedFor: DGX Spark / GB10 systems wanting dense 27B quality at ~9 GB resident
single-stream decode with DSpark speculative acceleration in Docker like other Spark backends

recipes.name: DGX Spark LTX-2.3 Distilled + DR34ML4Y
recipes.summary: On-demand synchronized audio/video generation with LTX-2.3 distilled and DR34ML4Y V3.
recommendedFor: DGX Spark users running local LTX-2.3 video generation through LLooM

recipes.name: DGX Spark LTX-2.3 Dev + DR34ML4Y Quality
recipes.summary: Author-recommended dev checkpoint with DR34ML4Y V3 and adjustable partial distillation.
recommendedFor: Highest-quality DR34ML4Y generation on DGX Spark with reduced anatomy distortion

recipes.name: Linux NVIDIA Qwen3 Embedding 4B vLLM
recipes.summary: Persistent local Qwen3-Embedding-4B pooling runtime for continuity and semantic retrieval.
recommendedFor: DGX Spark and CUDA hosts needing a local semantic-memory embedding service

recipes.name: Apple Silicon Qwen3 Embedding 4B Ollama
recipes.summary: Persistent local Qwen3-Embedding-4B runtime for continuity and semantic retrieval on Apple Silicon.
recommendedFor: Apple Silicon Macs needing a co-resident local semantic-memory embedding service

recipes.name: Apple Silicon Qwen3.6 35B-A3B OptiQ (official)
recipes.summary: Official-faithful Qwen3.6-35B-A3B via mlx-community OptiQ mixed 4/8-bit + mlx_lm.server.
recommendedFor: M-series Macs with at least 48 GB unified memory
agentic chat/coding that should match stock Qwen3.6 behavior

recipes.name: DGX Spark ThinkingCap Qwen3.6 27B NVFP4 vLLM
recipes.summary: Token-efficient ThinkingCap Qwen3.6 27B NVFP4 candidate for NVIDIA GB10.
recommendedFor: DGX Spark users evaluating shorter reasoning traces at retained answer quality

versions.notes: Tuned vLLM nightly recipe retained for reproducibility.
Promotes released vLLM 0.25.0 for the measured 27B dense GB10 lane.

recipes.name: DGX Spark Qwen3.6 Unsloth NVFP4 vLLM
recipes.summary: Curated Qwen3.6 27B dense and 35B-A3B MoE NVFP4 lanes for NVIDIA GB10.
recommendedFor: DGX Spark and GB10 systems with 128 GB unified memory

recipes.name: High-memory local image generation
recipes.summary: FLUX.2 Klein 4B fast generation/editing plus Qwen-Image-2512 generation and Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 reference editing for Apple Silicon and NVIDIA.
recommendedFor: local image generation without a host connection

recipes.name: DGX Spark FLUX.2 Klein 4B + Qwen Image
recipes.summary: LLooM-managed Docker lanes for fast FLUX.2 Klein 4B generation/editing, Qwen-Image-2512 generation, and Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 reference editing on NVIDIA GB10.
recommendedFor: local image generation and reference editing through LLooM

recipes.name: Apple Silicon Qwen3.6 MTPLX fast lanes
recipes.summary: Best observed Qwen3.6 dense and MoE lanes for Apple Silicon using MTPLX.
recommendedFor: M-series Macs with at least 64 GB unified memory
agentic coding workloads that need 262K context
